default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Dimmo and GrowthX to discuss ongoing projects and technical issues.](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Critical bug discovered: duplicate content and irrelevant links appearing in articles due to possible migration issues from Webflow CMS](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Content structure refinement needed: standardize headers and remove unnecessary sections](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Publishing process inefficient: formatting lost when pasting content, requiring manual fixes (40 mins/article)](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)

## Topics

### Technical Issues with Content Display

  - [Duplicate sections appearing after 'cons' in articles (e.g., company overview, pricing repeated)](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Irrelevant links showing up (e.g., Salesforce link in Wormforge article)](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Likely caused by migration from Webflow CMS or data fetching issues](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Bug needs urgent investigation and fix](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)

### Content Structure Optimization

  - [Prateek shared ideal article structure:](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
    1.  Company overview (establish trust)
    2.  Pricing
    3.  Benefits and functionalities
    4.  Pros, security, compliance, customer support
    5.  User reviews and competitors
    6.  How to use (optional extra section)
  - [Legal info section at bottom to be removed](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Jenn to adjust outline based on Prateek's screenshot](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Publishing Process Inefficiencies

  - [Current process takes \~40 minutes per article](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [Formatting (H1, H2, H3, bullet points) lost when pasting from Airtable to CMS](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Manual reformatting required, significantly slowing down the process](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [Potential solution: Investigate if Markdown input retains formatting](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Lucas (CTO) to look into publishing support and formatting retention](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Content Generation Challenges

  - [Jenn working on streamlining workflow for faster content generation at scale](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Large content pieces (6000+ words) causing Aerofs to slow down and API timeouts](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jenn to adjust content outline based on Prateek's structure screenshot](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Prateek to follow up with Lucas (CTO) about:](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
    1.  Investigating and fixing the duplicate content/irrelevant links bug
    2.  Improving publishing support to reduce time from 40 to 5-10 minutes
    3.  Exploring Markdown input as a potential formatting solution
  - [Team to reconvene once Lucas is available to discuss technical issues](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [Continue refining content generation process for efficiency and scale](https://fathom.video/share/h4dmmzfyFkcpXuTYZ16D6mB-q4pofaJN?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)

action_items.description: Adjust article outline to match Prateek's screenshot; remove extra sections from generated content
Inform Lucas re: duplicate content + incorrect links issues in articles; inquire about Markdown input for content to retain formatting
